$comment: Design token file for the Custom Slot component
$description: A placeholder content area rendered inside the Accordion when it is in the Expanded state. Acts as a blank canvas for injecting arbitrary content. Visually presented as a rounded gray box with a centered 'Custom Slot' label to indicate the insertion point.

$component.name: Custom Slot
$component.usage: Sub-component of Accordion — occupies the expanded content region. Not used standalone.

height.description: Fixed height of the slot container

vertical.description: Top and bottom inset within the slot container

background.description: #eaecf0 — subtle gray fill to visually distinguish the slot area
